title: Amtech U0455 Anvil Pruner, 8" (20cm), Secateurs, Ergonomic Handles, Safety Catch, Corrosion Resistant
features: VERSATILE: These 8" (20cm) anvil pruners are ideal for a wide range of cutting and pruning tasks around the garden
COMFORTABLE AND SAFE TO USE: The secateurs have ergonomic handles for comfort and thumb-operated locking catches for added safety
CORROSION RESISTANT: The blades of the anvil pruner are coated for corrosion resistance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
